landing.hero_description: Eto to ni aabo fun sísọ awọn iṣẹlẹ laimi fi orukọ han
landing.ngo_description: Ṣakoso awọn iṣẹlẹ, ran awọn olufaragba lọwọ

features.anonymous_description: Sọ awọn iṣẹlẹ ni aabo ati laimi orukọ
features.resources_description: Wa awọn iṣẹ atilẹyin ni adugbo
features.space_description: Ikọkọ ati aabo rẹ jẹ pataki julọ

dashboard.help_available: Iranlọwọ wa ni gbogbo igba. Aabo rẹ ṣe pataki.

incident_types.unwanted_touching: Ifọwọkan ti a ko fẹ tabi ipaniyan

report.title: Fi Ijabọ Silẹ
report.anonymous_notice: Ijabọ rẹ jẹ laimi orukọ patapata ayafi ti o ba yan lati fun ni alaye olubasọrọ.
report.tell_what_happened: Sọ fun wa ohun ti o ṣẹlẹ *
report.description_placeholder: Sọ fun wa ohun ti o ṣẹlẹ ni ọrọ tirẹ. O le kọ pupọ tabi diẹ bi o ti fẹ...
report.description_help: Sọ ohun ti o ṣẹlẹ, igba ti o ṣẹlẹ, ati ibi ti o ṣẹlẹ. Lo awọn ọrọ rọrun.
report.upload_files: Gbe awọn aworan, fidio, tabi iwe soke
report.file_types: O to 10MB fun faili kọọkan. Ti a gba laaye: JPG, PNG, PDF, MP4
report.categorize_optional: Ran wa lọwọ lati to eyi sinu ẹka (Ti o ba fẹ)
report.category_placeholder: Yan ẹka ti o ba fẹ
report.category_help: Eyi ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa lati so ọ pọ mọ awọn eniyan to tọ, ṣugbọn o le fo eyi silẹ.
report.contact_info: Fi alaye olubasọrọ silẹ fun atẹle
report.contact_optional: Ti o ba fẹ: Fun ni awọn alaye olubasọrọ rẹ ti o ba fẹ ki a tẹle ijabọ rẹ
report.best_time: Akoko Ti O Dara Julọ Lati Pe
report.accuracy_notice: Nipa fifi ijabọ yi silẹ, o jẹwọ pe alaye ti o fun jẹ otitọ si bi o ti mọ.

confirmation.report_sent: A ti fi ijabọ rẹ ranṣẹ ni aabo
confirmation.review_notice: A o wo ijabọ rẹ laarin wakati 24. O ni igboya lati sọrọ.
confirmation.report_another_description: Sọ fun wa nipa iṣoro miiran
confirmation.help_description: Wo awọn ibi ti o le ran ọ lọwọ
confirmation.safety_message: Iranlọwọ wa ni gbogbo igba. Aabo rẹ ṣe pataki.
